zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane II De Marmion於1284年3月25日出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Philip Marmion75歲，母親Mary Cantilupe49歲。她於1299年之前與Thomas de Ludlow I結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1341年在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane II De Marmion于1284年3月25日出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Philip Marmion75岁，母亲Mary Cantilupe49岁。她于1299年之前与Thomas de Ludlow I结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1341年在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: English:

nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: English (Lancashire and Gloucestershire):
variant of   Marmion  .
variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane II De Marmion was born on 25 March 1284, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Philip Marmion, was 75 and her mother, Mary Cantilupe, was 49. She married Thomas de Ludlow I before 1299. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1341, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane II De Marmion est née le 25 mars 1284, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Marmion, avait 75 ans et sa mère, Mary Cantilupe, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Ludlow I avant 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1341, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane II De Marmion am 25. März 1284 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Marmion 75 und ihre Mutter Mary Cantilupe 49. Sie hat vor 1299 Thomas de Ludlow I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1341 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane II De Marmion è nata il il 25 marzo 1284 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Philip Marmion, aveva 75 anni e sua madre, Mary Cantilupe, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Ludlow I prima del 1299. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1341, nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane II De Marmionが1284年3月25日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip Marmionは75歳，母Mary Cantilupeは49歳であった。1299年以前にThomas de Ludlow Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1341年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane II De Marmion(이)가 1284년 3월 25일 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Marmion(은)는 75세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Cantilupe(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1299년 이전 Thomas de Ludlow I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1341년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane II De Marmion nasceu em 25 de março de 1284, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Marmion, tinha 75 anos e sua mãe, Mary Cantilupe, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Ludlow I antes 1299. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1341, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane II De Marmion родилась 25 марта 1284 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Marmion было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Cantilupe, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Ludlow I перед 1299 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1341 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane II De Marmion nació el 25 de marzo de 1284, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Marmion, tenía 75 años y su mamá, Mary Cantilupe, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Thomas de Ludlow I antes de 1299. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1341, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
